title: memecylon englerianum
intro: Memecylon englerianum, also known as the Mysore Ebony, is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which can help to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Memecylon englerianum include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, such as bronchitis and pneumonia. Memecylon englerianum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety in modern medicine.
